message.content:
Find the backend code for the OFFER审批 (offer approval) feature in D:\project\info-gitlab\hr\hr-server. Look for:
1. Controller methods handling offer approval list/pending approval endpoints
2. Any routes related to "offer" and "approval" 
3. Model queries involved

Search for keywords: "offer", "approval", "审批", "OfferApproval", "offer_approval" in controllers, routes, and models.

Be very thorough - check routes/my_others.php for dynamic routing, and all controllers in app/Http/Controllers/
